news.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
news.description: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

news.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
news.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

news.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
news.description: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

news.title: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
news.description: OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.

news.title: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
news.description: As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.

news.title: Anthropic Says That Claude Contains Its Own Kind of Emotions
news.description: Researchers at the company found representations inside of Claude that perform functions similar to human feelings.

news.title: Widely used Trivy scanner compromised in ongoing supply-chain attack
news.description: Admins: Sorry to say, but it's likely a rotate-your-secrets kind of weekend.

news.title: 36氪晚报｜AI大模型产品“奇趣”完成千万级融资；阶跃星辰上线Step 3.5 Flash 2603模型；沃尔沃汽车第一季度全球销量同比下降11%
news.description:
大公司：
  滴滴租车推出“无车必赔”机制，无车率下降15%
  为提升履约确定性，滴滴租车推出“无车必赔”机制：因商家原因导致无法用车，平台将协调升级车型，或全额退款并赔付三倍日租金。规则实施后，无车率同期下降15%，平台共赔付预约无车订单三百余次。针对车损纠纷和线下乱收费情况，平台提供免费第三方定损及先行赔付，费用全程线上公示，统一收款，严禁线下加价，违规收费先行赔付，线下乱收费
